response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The first part of the video features the song 'FLOWGLOW' which was not in the reference lyrics but was manually transcribed. The second part features 'good enough' which matches the reference lyrics with slight variations in the live performance.
2. JSON Usage: Used the reference lyrics for 'good enough' as a baseline but manually updated them to reflect the exact spoken Japanese/English lyrics in the live performance, correcting any discrepancies.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are carefully synchronized to match the rapid delivery of the live vocals and the transition periods of the concert.

subtitles.original: 変わりゆく景色そっと 気づけばいたよ東京
subtitles.english: The changing scenery, so softly... before I knew it, I was in Tokyo

subtitles.original: 夜空を見下すトーク 昇る月に向かうボート
subtitles.english: A talk looking down at the night sky, a boat heading towards the rising moon

subtitles.original: みんなに見せるよショー 力になれることを
subtitles.english: I'll show everyone the show, and that I can be a source of strength

subtitles.original: 一世一度しかない
subtitles.english: You only live once

subtitles.original: どう生きるか全部キミにしたい
subtitles.english: I want to dedicate how I live entirely to you

subtitles.original: 好きなように生きていける世界
subtitles.english: A world where we can live just as we like

subtitles.original: 広げていけるこの視界
subtitles.english: We can expand this vision of ours

subtitles.original: にゃにゃにゃにゃにゃん バズるのしてあげるよ
subtitles.english: Nya-nya-nya-nya-nyan! I'll make you go viral!

subtitles.original: 音が狂いだす
subtitles.english: The sound starts going wild

subtitles.original: フィルターの針を
subtitles.english: Set the filter's needle

subtitles.original: 踊れ Let's Party Go!
subtitles.english: Dance, let's party go!

subtitles.original: 世界中に配信するライブ ここはホーム
subtitles.english: Streaming live all over the world, this is home

subtitles.original: 80億 of 星の毎日 照らすコントロール
subtitles.english: Controlling the light that shines on 8 billion stars daily

subtitles.original: 通知が鳴り止まないショウは デッドオアアライブ
subtitles.english: The notifications won't stop ringing in this live-or-die show

subtitles.original: ハチャメチャなアタマで 波長合わせ文字の上
subtitles.english: With a chaotic mind, syncing wavelengths on top of the text

subtitles.original: 100万人の今日も 価値を変えてるノートに
subtitles.english: Changing the value of today for a million people, in my notes

subtitles.original: 変わりゆく景色そっと 気づけばいたよ東京
subtitles.english: The changing scenery, so softly, before I knew it, I was in Tokyo

subtitles.english: My mind goes blank, that's my routine

subtitles.original: 起きれた私、えらい
subtitles.english: I'm proud of myself for waking up

subtitles.original: 傘を持てた私、えらい
subtitles.english: I'm proud of myself for bringing an umbrella

subtitles.original: ネガティブはありえない
subtitles.english: No need for negativity

subtitles.original: 自由に気分をリライト

subtitles.english: Sleepy, sleepy, but I won't sleep tonight

subtitles.english: The truth's somewhere beyond the rainbow
